title: Cobana guatemalensis
taxonomy: Cobana guatemalensis is classified within the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the tribe Psychotrieae and is a member of the genus Cobana. The classification of Cobana guatemalensis places it within the order Gentianales. This plant is native to Central America, specifically in the regions of Guatemala. Further research on Cobana guatemalensis may provide more specific details on its classification.
